hero.title: Goal Tracker

differences.title: Keep goals and progress connected
differences.description: Goal Tracker turns long-lived goals into visible milestones, check-ins, and review signals.

items.description: Create editable goals with category, priority, status, target date, and progress.

items.description: Review active, paused, completed, and high-priority goals without losing context.

feel.title: A practical goal workspace
